title: Change Healthcare (Optum) - Payer-Provider Transaction Infrastructure
problem: Payers and providers need efficient transaction processing for eligibility, claims, and payments. Fragmented systems create delays, errors, and administrative costs.
solution: End-to-end healthcare transaction platform. Eligibility verification, claims processing, prior authorization, payment processing, and analytics. Deep integration with payers and providers.
technology: X12 transaction processing, clearinghouse, real-time APIs, analytics
traction_signals: 4 out of 5 US health plans rely on them
regulatory_notes: HIPAA compliant, handles PHI at scale
varden_fit: HIGH — This IS the US healthcare transaction infrastructure. Europe has nothing equivalent. The clearinghouse model is directly applicable to EU multi-payer systems.
notes: CONTRARIAN: This is pure infrastructure plumbing. Unsexy but processes trillions in healthcare transactions. EU needs this desperately.
